name: Track Rotate
description: Track Rotate is a free puzzle online game for boys played on PuzzleGame. You need to rotate different squares to build the correct path before time runs out. Try all blocks to get the vehicle to its destination. Pass the level within the required time! Mobile, Tablet, and Desktop are playable. It is a new, challenging, and fun experience. Good Luck!
tags: 3D, Android, Block, Boy, Car, Fun, HTML5, Kid, Matching, Online, Parking, Puzzle
